title: The Brief – Who tapped von der Leyen’s spin doctor?
summary_full: Old assumptions – that backchannel chats stay private, that spin remains deniable, that the ‘Bubble’ plays by gentler rules – no longer hold
summary_public: Old assumptions – that backchannel chats stay private, that spin remains deniable, that the ‘Bubble’ plays by gentler rules – no longer hold
